walkIn.title: Walk-In
walkIn.description: Select the service and go directly to the floor plan to mark an available table as occupied. No guest data needed.

reservations.title: Reservations
reservations.newReservationSoon: Creating a new reservation is coming soon.

mini_floor_plan.title: Floor plan overview
mini_floor_plan.filter_message: Reservations filtered by Table {{table}} — click again to clear

reservations.statusError: Failed to update status. Please try again.

newReservation.title: New reservation
newReservation.autoAssignHint: Choose 'Auto-assign' for smart table selection based on party size

errors.dateInvalid: Please choose a date in the future
errors.partySizeMin: Party size must be at least 1

guests.title: Guests CRM
guests.searchPlaceholder: Search by name, email or tag...
guests.emptyHint: Adjust your search or add a guest

experiences.title: Manage experiences
experiences.subtitle: Manage your menus, events, and specials
experiences.emptyHint: Add your first menu, event, or special to offer guests extra options when booking
experiences.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete "{{name}}"? This cannot be undone.
experiences.servicesHint: Select nothing = applies to all services
experiences.daysHint: Select nothing = applies to all days

waitlist.title: Waitlist
waitlist.subtitle: Manage guests waiting for an available time slot
waitlist.addError: Failed to add. Please try again.
waitlist.removeConfirm: Are you sure you want to remove {{name}} from the waitlist?
waitlist.emptyHint: All guests have a confirmed reservation or the list is empty for this date

seatingPlan.title: Seating Plan
seatingPlan.editModeHint: Drag tables · Enter to save · Escape to cancel
seatingPlan.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete {{name}}?
seatingPlan.noTablesHint: Add a table to get started
seatingPlan.noTablesYet: No tables on the floor plan yet
seatingPlan.noTablesYetHint: Go to Settings > Capacity to configure tables, or add them manually here.
seatingPlan.syncSuccess: Tables have been successfully added to the floor plan.
seatingPlan.syncNotAvailable: Sync is not yet available. Add tables manually.

aiSuggestion.title: AI Seating Advice
aiSuggestion.subtitle: Let AI calculate the best table assignment based on your data
aiSuggestion.preferencesPlaceholder: E.g. window seat, quiet corner, wheelchair accessible…
aiSuggestion.analyzing: AI is analysing your floor plan…
aiSuggestion.highlightHint: Recommended tables are highlighted with a pulsing glow on the floor plan
aiSuggestion.errorTimeout: AI analysis took too long (>5s). Please try again or assign manually.
aiSuggestion.errorGeneral: AI analysis failed. Please check your connection and try again.
aiSuggestion.errorInvalidParty: Please enter a valid party size (minimum 1).
aiSuggestion.errorManualHint: You can also assign a table manually via the floor plan.

bulk.confirmDelete: Are you sure you want to delete {{count}} tables?

seating.aiReshuffleComingSoon: AI re-layout will be available soon

login.title: Sign in
login.subtitle: Sign in with your Internet Identity
login.loginFailed: Sign in failed. Please try again.
login.subtitle2: Sign in to your restaurant management
login.chooseRoleSub: Which role would you like to sign in with?
login.identityNote: Secure and private via Internet Identity — no password needed.
login.ownerLockedNote: The owner role is assigned by the restaurant owner.

settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Manage your restaurant configuration
settings.totalSeatsHint: The maximum number of guests that can book simultaneously for one time slot.
settings.slotIntervalHint: How often a new time slot is available (in minutes).
settings.savedWithSync: Settings saved. Tables have been automatically added to the floor plan.
settings.comingSoonDesc: This feature is under development and will be available soon.

seatingSettings.title: Floor plan configuration
seatingSettings.subtitle: Manage tables, zones and layout of your floor plan. {{count}} tables configured.

walkin.banner: Walk-in mode — click a table to mark it as occupied
walkin.subtitle: Walk-in mode — click a table
walkin.clickHint: Click a table to mark it as occupied for walk-in guests

viewOnly.subtitle: {{count}} tables · select date and service
viewOnly.noTablesHint: Go to Settings → Floor plan to add and arrange tables.

zones.subtitle: Define the areas of your restaurant used across the floor plan, availability and analytics
zones.listHint: Each zone has a color, name and maximum guest count
zones.name: Name
zones.emptyHint: Add your first zone to get started. Zones are used in the floor plan, widget and analytics.
zones.infoNote: Zones are linked to the floor plan and the reservation widget. Deleting a zone also removes it from all tables and filters.

general.subtitle: Basic restaurant information visible to guests
general.logoUrlHint: Link to your restaurant logo (HTTPS). Displayed in the widget and guest communications.

openingHours.subtitle: Configure per service, fixed closing days and exceptional closures
openingHours.fixedClosingDaysHint: Always closed on these days of the week
openingHours.exceptionalDaysHint: Specific dates: holidays, events, private parties…
openingHours.noExceptionalDays: No exceptional closing days added yet

capacity.subtitle: Set maximum guests per service, zone, table type and occupancy ceiling
capacity.perServiceHint: Override the default capacity for each service period
capacity.noServicesHint: Add services in Opening hours first
capacity.tableTypesHint: Types of tables and their seating capacity
capacity.occupancyCeilingLabel: Never exceed {{value}}% occupancy to allow walk-ins

tableGroups.title: Table Groups
tableGroups.description: Define which tables can be combined for larger parties

reservationRules.subtitle: Manage booking window, cancellation policy, deposit and maximum stay
reservationRules.advanceBookingSubtitle: How far in advance guests can make a reservation
reservationRules.cancellationHoursHint: Hours before the reservation during which the guest can cancel for free
reservationRules.depositSubtitle: Protect your restaurant against last-minute cancellations
reservationRules.depositAmountHint: Amount in euros paid in advance
reservationRules.depositAbovePartyHint: Deposit only required for larger groups
reservationRules.noShowFeeNote: Enable Stripe integration (Settings > Integrations) to automatically collect no-show fees.
reservationRules.minimumConsumptionHint: Optional: minimum spend per reservation (0 = disabled)
reservationRules.partySizeSubtitle: Minimum and maximum number of guests per reservation
reservationRules.maxStaySubtitle: How long a table remains reserved per service

guestForm.subtitle: Configure required fields, special requests, and custom questions in the reservation form
guestForm.requiredFieldsSubtitle: Choose which guest fields are mandatory when filling out the reservation form
guestForm.requirePhoneHint: Guest must provide a phone number
guestForm.showBabiesChildrenHint: Displays the option for babies and children (< 3 years) in the booking widget
guestForm.specialRequestsSubtitle: Enable the options guests can tick when making a reservation
guestForm.customQuestionsSubtitle: Add your own questions for guests to answer during booking
guestForm.questionTextPlaceholder: E.g. Which wine arrangement would you prefer?

notifications.subtitle: Configure which email notifications guests receive and customise the templates
notifications.confirmationDesc: Send a confirmation to the guest after creating a reservation
notifications.cancellationDesc: Send a message when a reservation is cancelled
notifications.reminderDesc: Send a reminder X hours before the reservation
notifications.emailDisabledNote: Email sending is disabled for this project. You can fill in the templates now; once email is enabled they will be sent automatically.
notifications.emailDisabledTemplateNote: Read-only — enable the email integration to edit
notifications.noTemplatesEnabled: Enable at least one email notification to edit its template
notifications.waitlistAutoActivateDesc: Automatically activate the waitlist when all time slots are full (100% booked)

editor.subject: Subject
editor.heading: Heading
editor.bodyPlaceholder: Write the content of your email here…
editor.logoUploaded: Logo uploaded — drag or click to change
editor.logoDragHint: Drag your logo here or click to upload
editor.logoSizeLimit: PNG, JPG or SVG — max. 1 MB
editor.resetConfirmDesc: All changes to this template will be undone. This cannot be reversed.

applyAll.button: Apply house style to all templates
applyAll.modalTitle: Apply house style to all templates
applyAll.modalDesc: The accent colour, background colour and logo from the selected template will be applied to all 4 templates. Existing text content will remain unchanged.
applyAll.successToast: House style applied to all email templates

reviewRequests.title: Review Requests
reviewRequests.subtitle: Automatically send a review request to guests after each visit
reviewRequests.enableToggleDesc: Enable to automatically send a message asking guests to leave a review after their visit
reviewRequests.delayDesc: Choose when the request is sent after the end of the visit
reviewRequests.messageDesc: Text received by the guest. Use {{guest_name}} and {{restaurant_name}} as dynamic variables.
reviewRequests.messagePlaceholder: Dear {{guest_name}}, thank you for visiting {{restaurant_name}}! Would you take a moment to share your experience?
reviewRequests.disabledNote: Review requests require email activation. You can configure the settings in advance.

branding.subtitle: Customise the appearance of the booking widget for your guests
branding.logoUrlHint: Link to your restaurant logo (HTTPS). Displayed at the top of the widget.
branding.welcomeTextPlaceholder: Welcome to Restaurant ZenReserve! We look forward to your visit.
branding.welcomeTextHint: Displayed at the top of the booking widget to guests. Max 200 characters.
branding.confirmationTextPlaceholder: Thank you for your reservation! You will receive a confirmation email shortly.
branding.confirmationTextHint: Displayed after a successful booking. Max 200 characters.
branding.defaultLanguageHint: The language in which the widget is displayed by default.
branding.sendConfirmationEmailHint: Automatically send a confirmation after each reservation.
branding.sendReminderEmailHint: Send a reminder to the guest before their visit.
branding.reminderHoursHint: E.g. 24 = reminder email 24 hours before arrival.
branding.darkModeHint: Choose the default display mode for the dashboard. The preference is stored locally.
branding.logoUploadHint: PNG, JPG, SVG or WebP. Max 2 MB. Shown in the widget and dashboard.

integrations.subtitle: Connect payment providers, POS systems, calendars and external APIs

payments.title: Payment providers
payments.subtitle: Connect Stripe or Mollie to accept deposits and guarantees
payments.stripeDesc: Accept payments via Stripe (credit card, iDEAL, Bancontact…)
payments.stripeKeyHint: Enter your Stripe publishable key (starts with pk_live_ or pk_test_). Never enter your secret key here.
payments.mollieDesc: Accept payments via Mollie — alternative to Stripe
payments.bothEnabledWarning: Both Stripe and Mollie are enabled. Only one payment provider should be active at a time.

pos.title: POS system
pos.subtitle: Connect your Point of Sale to sync reservations automatically
pos.label: Select your POS system
pos.integrationNote: {{pos}} integration will sync reservations automatically. Contact support to complete the setup.

calendar.title: Calendar sync
calendar.subtitle: Keep your Google Calendar or Outlook up to date with new reservations
calendar.enableDesc: Automatically add new reservations to your calendar
calendar.comingSoonNote: Google Calendar and Outlook sync will be available in a future update. Connect your account now to be ready when it launches.

api.title: API access
api.subtitle: Use your API key to connect external tools and automations
api.keyHint: Keep this key secure. Do not share it publicly. Use it in the Authorization header of API requests.
api.usageNote: Include your API key in the Authorization header: Authorization: Bearer <your-key>. Contact support for API documentation.

team.subtitle: Manage your team members and role-based access
team.inviteError: Could not add team member — check your connection and try again.
team.inviteNote: The team member will need to log in with Internet Identity and select the assigned role.
team.confirmRemove: Are you sure you want to remove {{name}} from the team?
team.readOnlyNote: Only the owner can add, edit or remove team members.

roleDesc.owner: Full access to all features, settings and team management
roleDesc.marketing: View guest list and analytics only

form.name: Name
form.principalIdHint: The principal ID is the unique identifier of the team member's Internet Identity. They can find it by logging in at identity.ic0.app.

seasonal.subtitle: Manage seasonal periods, zone activation and capacity overrides
seasonal.name: Name
seasonal.descriptionPlaceholder: E.g. Terrace open during summer months
seasonal.activatedZonesHint: Which zones become active during this season
seasonal.capacityOverrideHint: Override the default capacity for this season (empty = use default)
seasonal.autoActivateHint: Automatically activate this season when the start date is reached
seasonal.activeNowHint: Toggle this season on or off immediately
seasonal.emptyHint: Add a season to automatically activate zones and adjust capacity, e.g. a summer terrace or holiday schedule.
seasonal.errorDateRequired: Start and end date are required
seasonal.errorDateOrder: Start date must be before end date
seasonal.errorOverlap: Overlaps with season '{{name}}'. Please choose different dates.
seasonal.perServiceCapacityHint: Override capacity per service for this season. Empty = use default.
seasonal.infoNote: Seasonal settings determine which zones are available and how many guests can be booked per period. Combine with opening hours for maximum control.

auditLog.title: Audit Log
auditLog.subtitle: Overview of all settings changes made by administrators
auditLog.emptyHint: Changes will appear here once settings are modified
auditLog.forbiddenHint: Only owners and managers can view the audit log

analytics.subtitle: Occupancy trends, peak hours and reservation patterns
analytics.emptyHint: Create reservations to start seeing statistics
